# Feature Specification Template

Use this template when planning a new feature.

## Feature: [name]

**Requested by**: [who]
**Priority**: [high / medium / low]

## Requirements

### What
[Clear description of what the feature does]

### Why
[Business justification or user need]

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] [Criterion 1]
- [ ] [Criterion 2]
- [ ] [Criterion 3]

## Design

### Affected Components
| Component | Change Type | Risk |
|-----------|-------------|------|
| [file/module] | [new / modify] | [low / medium / high] |

### API Changes
[If applicable — new endpoints, changed signatures, etc.]

### Data Changes
[If applicable — new tables, schema changes, migrations]

## Implementation Plan

- [ ] Step 1: [description]
- [ ] Step 2: [description]
- [ ] Step 3: Tests
- [ ] Step 4: Review

## Dependencies

- [External dependencies, if any]
- [Other features or changes this depends on]
